other_observers: Mark Chavez, Norm Erthal, Joe Roller; I am the original finder.
specific_location: Thompson Ranch, approximately 15 miles Northeast of Limon.
description: A gray, plain looking warbler with a pale yellow wash to the face, breast and undertail coverts. A gray auricular patch with some yellow wash behind the auriculars. Some dark streaking below, greenish rump and sharply pointed bill. See photos!Behaviors: Foraging deliberately in Ponderosa Pines with other warblers, primarily Audubon's Yellow-rumped Warblers.Call: nonePlumage: alternate
